author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: Added ToDeviceBackward grad_fn to tensor.rs. When to() is called on a non-leaf tensor with requires_grad under grad-enabled context, the result is created via from_operation with ToDeviceBackward, which copies gradients back to the source device during backward. Leaf tensors still get from_storage (they're gradient sources, not graph nodes). All 574 core tests + 23 embedding tests pass.
